AgeGroup.description: Population distributed across standard age bands

Communication.description: Households classified by ownership of communication items such as telephone, radio, and television

ConstructionYear.description: Housing units classified by the decade or period in which they were constructed

Economy.description: Population classified by economic activity status including employed, unemployed, and economically inactive

Education.description: Population classified by the highest level of educational qualification attained

Ethnicity.description: Population distributed by ethnic group such as Sinhalese, Sri Lanka Tamil, Moor, and others

Floor.description: Housing units classified by the main material used for floor construction

Fuel.description: Households classified by the primary fuel used for cooking

Gender.description: Population broken down by male and female

Lighting.description: Households classified by their primary source of lighting

Marital.description: Population classified by marital status such as never married, married, widowed, and divorced

Occupancy.description: Housing units classified by occupancy status, distinguishing occupied from vacant units

Ownership.description: Households classified by the ownership status of their dwelling, such as owned or rented

Persons.description: Households classified by the number of persons living in the dwelling

Quarters.description: Households classified by the type of living quarters such as housing units, collective living quarters, and makeshift housing

RelationshipToHead.description: Population classified by their relationship to the head of the household

Religion.description: Population distributed by religious affiliation such as Buddhist, Hindu, Islam, and Christian

Roof.description: Housing units classified by the main material used for roof construction

Rooms.description: Households classified by the number of rooms in the dwelling

Structure.description: Housing units classified by structural type such as permanent, semi-permanent, and temporary

Toilet.description: Households classified by the type of toilet facility available

Unit.description: Housing units classified by type such as house, flat, annexe, or room

Wall.description: Housing units classified by the main material used for wall construction

Waste.description: Households classified by the method used for solid waste disposal

Water.description: Households classified by their main source of drinking water
